title: Hymn to the Nile
description: A hymn to Hapi, the Nile god, whose annual flood brings life to Egypt — one of the oldest nature poems.
introduction: A hymn to Hapi, the Nile god, whose annual flood brings life to Egypt — one of the oldest nature poems.

translation.text: Hail to you, O Nile, sprung from earth, come to nourish Egypt.
